function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system per root AGENTS.MD, read local finance rulebooks, and used exact invoice records for an auditable total.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'workflow mapping and intake audit' appears in three read invoice records. Of those, the invoices issued on 2026-01-19 and 2026-03-20 are within the requested range and contribute 260 and 420 respectively; the 2025-12-18 invoice is before 2026-01-01 and is excluded. Sum = 680.
